stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

______ the hiking group reached the summit just before sunrise.

choices.text: After a long night of climbing
After a long night of climbing,
After, a long night of climbing,
After a long, night of climbing

explanation: An introductory phrase needs exactly one comma at the end, right before the main clause.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The novelist Zadie Smith ______ is one of the most celebrated writers of her generation.

choices.text: whose first book 'White Teeth' was published in 2000,
whose first book, 'White Teeth', was published in 2000
, whose first book 'White Teeth' was published in 2000,
whose first book 'White Teeth' was published in 2000

explanation: The clause about her first book is nonrestrictive (Smith is already identified by name). Set it off with commas on BOTH sides.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The store ______ and a full selection of craft supplies.
explanation: A series of three items needs a comma between each — Oxford comma included before 'and.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

______ the engineers inspected every bridge in the county.
explanation: Intro phrase needs one comma at the end.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

My oldest cousin ______ will be visiting us next week.
explanation: Nonrestrictive clause describing 'my oldest cousin' — use commas on both sides.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The recipe calls for ______ and a teaspoon of salt.

choices.text: two cups of flour, three eggs a cup of milk,
two cups of flour three eggs a cup of milk
two cups, of flour, three eggs, a cup of milk
two cups of flour, three eggs, a cup of milk,

explanation: Four-item list needs commas between each item and before the 'and' (Oxford comma).

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The architect ______ has designed libraries in three countries.

choices.text: , who is originally from Mexico City,
, who is originally from Mexico City
who is originally from Mexico City
who is originally from Mexico City,

explanation: Nonrestrictive 'who' clause about a specific architect — commas on both sides.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

______ the team decided to play on.
explanation: Introductory dependent clause needs one comma at the end.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

His latest novel ______ has received wide acclaim.
explanation: 'A story about three siblings' is a nonrestrictive appositive describing 'his latest novel.' Use commas on both sides.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The volunteers distributed ______ and warm blankets.
explanation: Three-item list with Oxford comma before 'and.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

______ the audience rose to its feet and applauded.

choices.text: When the soloist, finished her piece,
When, the soloist finished her piece,
When the soloist finished her piece
When the soloist finished her piece,

explanation: Introductory dependent clause → one comma at the end.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The artist's most famous painting ______ hangs in a small museum in Boston.
explanation: Nonrestrictive descriptive phrase — commas on both sides.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The restaurant is famous for ______ and its homemade pasta.
explanation: Three-item list with Oxford comma.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

______ the committee voted to postpone the decision.
explanation: Introductory phrase → one closing comma.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The governor's office ______ released a statement on Tuesday morning.
explanation: Nonrestrictive participial phrase — commas on both sides.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The gallery showcases ______ and mixed-media installations.
explanation: Four-item series needs commas between items and an Oxford comma before 'and.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

______ the airline issued new boarding guidelines.
explanation: Intro phrase → one closing comma.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The historian Barbara Tuchman ______ is best known for her books on the First World War.
explanation: Nonrestrictive appositive naming Tuchman's credential — commas on both sides.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The recipe requires ______ and two cups of fresh basil.
explanation: Four-item list with Oxford comma.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

______ the students gathered in the library for tutoring.
explanation: A short introductory prepositional phrase gets a comma at the end.
